chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2416 of 2018 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order as to non-prosecution of Misc. No.32841/2022 2. For hearing of Misc. No. 10381/2018 3. For hearing of main case 22.05.2025 Mr. Ali Almani, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Shahid Ali Qureshi, advocate for respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Mr. Tariq Aziz, Assistant Collector It is jointly submitted that this petition is covered by the Division Bench judgment of this court reported as 2021 PTD 104, hence, may be allowed for the same reasons and upon the same terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
